context: Evaluates the agent's ability to add CI pipeline steps for tooling checks.

checklist.name: CI workflow updated
checklist.description: Lint, format:check, and typecheck steps are added to CI

checklist.name: Package.json scripts referenced
checklist.description: The CI steps use npm scripts, not inline commands

checklist.name: Scripts created if missing
checklist.description: Missing scripts are added to package.json

checklist.name: Existing steps preserved
checklist.description: The existing test step is not removed
